TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Buta ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Nango go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 112 buwan, 349 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 317 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 32 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 83%, Amis 3%, Truku 1%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Buta hya' ga Hagaparis. tay 'zil na Buta hya' ga K'yang. rekisi kayal kayan hani ga, mutuw payat bikgan nya. aring sku tugan byating tehuk sa nt'yu byating ga tmangu abaw son ma. 'mubuy sa mt'yu byating tehuk m'isu byating ga 'bagan son ma. ru aring sku m'isu byating tehuk sku mpuw sazing byating ga mshuw abaw son ma, nanu iy mpuw sazing byating tehuk sku tugan byating lga, 'misan son lma. kyokay maki 1 kyokay. kyokay hiya ga kay na Gipun, ye'igi slali ga ungat ku kyokay, kyala mpitu pgan kayan wayan hminas ku mnwah rrgyax ku renrosya na Lyutux Kayan. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βuta ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ɣiraŋ keŋ atu naŋo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, truku *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na βuta ħjaʔ ɣa ħaɣaparis~ɕ. taj ʔzil na βuta ħjaʔ ɣa kʔjaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kajan ħani ɣa, mutuw pajat βikɣan nja. ariŋ s~ɕku tuɣan βjatiŋ teħuk s~ɕa ntʔju βjatiŋ ɣa tmaŋu aβaw s~ɕon ma. ʔmuβuj s~ɕa mtʔju βjatiŋ teħuk mʔis~ɕu βjatiŋ ɣa ʔβaɣan s~ɕon ma. ru ariŋ s~ɕku mʔis~ɕu βjatiŋ teħuk s~ɕku mpuw s~ɕaziŋ βjatiŋ ɣa ms~ɕħuw aβaw s~ɕon ma, nanu ij mpuw s~ɕaziŋ βjatiŋ teħuk s~ɕku tuɣan βjatiŋ lɣa, ʔmis~ɕan s~ɕon lma. kjokaj maki * kjokaj. kjokaj ħija ɣa kaj na ɣipun, jeʔiɣi s~ɕlali ɣa uŋat ku kjokaj, kjala mpitu pɣan kajan wajan ħminas~ɕ ku mnwaħ rrɣjax ku renros~ɕja na ljutux kajan. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Buta ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Nango go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 112 buwan, 349 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 317 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 32 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 83%, Amis 3%, Truku 1%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Buta hya' ga Hagaparis. tay 'zil na Buta hya' ga K'yang. rekisi kayal kayan hani ga, mutuw payat bikgan nya. aring sku tugan byating tehuk sa nt'yu byating ga tmangu abaw son ma. 'mubuy sa mt'yu byating tehuk m'isu byating ga 'bagan son ma. ru aring sku m'isu byating tehuk sku mpuw sazing byating ga mshuw abaw son ma, nanu iy mpuw sazing byating tehuk sku tugan byating lga, 'misan son lma. kyokay maki 1 kyokay. kyokay hiya ga kay na Gipun, ye'igi slali ga ungat ku kyokay, kyala mpitu pgan kayan wayan hminas ku mnwah rrgyax ku renrosya na Lyutux Kayan. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βuta ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ɣiraŋ keŋ atu naŋo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, truku *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na βuta ħjaʔ ɣa ħaɣaparis~ɕ. taj ʔzil na βuta ħjaʔ ɣa kʔjaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kajan ħani ɣa, mutuw pajat βikɣan nja. ariŋ s~ɕku tuɣan βjatiŋ teħuk s~ɕa ntʔju βjatiŋ ɣa tmaŋu aβaw s~ɕon ma. ʔmuβuj s~ɕa mtʔju βjatiŋ teħuk mʔis~ɕu βjatiŋ ɣa ʔβaɣan s~ɕon ma. ru ariŋ s~ɕku mʔis~ɕu βjatiŋ teħuk s~ɕku mpuw s~ɕaziŋ βjatiŋ ɣa ms~ɕħuw aβaw s~ɕon ma, nanu ij mpuw s~ɕaziŋ βjatiŋ teħuk s~ɕku tuɣan βjatiŋ lɣa, ʔmis~ɕan s~ɕon lma. kjokaj maki * kjokaj. kjokaj ħija ɣa kaj na ɣipun, jeʔiɣi s~ɕlali ɣa uŋat ku kjokaj, kjala mpitu pɣan kajan wajan ħminas~ɕ ku mnwaħ rrɣjax ku renros~ɕja na ljutux kajan. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
